title: sweech cost: USD/M-token per profile + budget filtering

context.text: From runecode RUNECODE_NEEDS_v3.md (S6). Implements ROADMAP Phase 1. AC: 'sweech cost' shows USD/M-token per profile + recent 7d spend; --budget filters accountSelector results. Cost table source: provider published rates + plan tier.

v3.2 EXTENSION (from codeuctor pushback). S6 must expose 'route_within_budget(profile, tier, max_cost_per_call_usd) -> {account, model}' API. Codeuctor's pre-plan cost forecast (T-LU-100) is decorative without this — codeuctor estimates, but if sweech can't constrain model selection by USD/call, sweech routes to cheapest-by-quota and the budget cap gets ignored. AC: S6 ships both the user-facing 'sweech cost' command AND the route_within_budget() API used by callers.
